title: Recraftable
description:
Adds more recipes to Minecraft for vanilla items and readds some old recipes.

Made with MCreator.
body:
Readds and adds new Minecraft recipes for more convenience. Adds, from the most recent update recipes for god apple, totem, saddle, horse armors, nametag, shulker shell, XP bottle, gunpowder, ghast tear, heart of the sea, andesite, granite, diorite, obsidian, crying obsidian, string, and echo shard.
Great for modpacks to make items easier to get.
